videos.title: HTML Full Course for Beginners
videos.description: A comprehensive 4-hour HTML course covering everything from basic tags to semantic HTML5 elements. Perfect for absolute beginners.

videos.title: HTML Crash Course For Absolute Beginners
videos.description: Brad Traversy walks through HTML fundamentals in this fast-paced crash course. Covers tags, attributes, forms, tables, and more.

videos.title: HTML Tutorial for Beginners: HTML Crash Course
videos.description: Mosh explains HTML concepts in an easy-to-understand way with practical examples. Great for complete beginners.

videos.title: Learn HTML – Full Tutorial for Beginners
videos.description: An in-depth HTML tutorial that covers all essential topics including forms, semantic elements, and best practices.

videos.title: HTML & CSS Full Course - Beginner to Pro
videos.description: A complete beginner-friendly course that teaches HTML and CSS from scratch with hands-on projects.
